description: A candid action photograph from a White House South Lawn youth sports event featuring the Washington Nationals' 'Racing Presidents' mascots. In the foreground two oversized-headed mascots in Nationals baseball jerseys (numbers and 'Nationals' script visible, with red sleeves/socks and white sneakers) sprint down a paved path; a third mascot, the Nationals' eagle 'Screech' in a Nationals jersey (number 00), runs at right near a checkered flag. A crowd of teenagers and adults in business and casual attire watches and cheers from the grass at left and center, some filming on phones; a man in a dark suit and women in light blazers stand among the spectators. The setting is a sunny lawn with green trees. There is no on-image text or graphic overlay. The White House included it in its 'Reviving the Presidential Fitness Test' and National Physical Fitness and Sports Month series.
